supply_chain.dependencies: Nuclear fuel procurement, natural gas supply for generation, uranium supply contracts, coal supply, purchased power agreements
risks: International sanctions, bans, retaliatory actions, or tariffs impacting trade with foreign countries

Dependence on reduced number of suppliers for nuclear plant parts
DOE failure to begin disposal of spent nuclear fuel as required, resulting in ongoing litigation and damages
Supply chain delays or disruptions affecting construction projects
Nuclear fuel availability and enrichment capacity constraints
